  NAME
    avx512_packed_dot_descriptors
  GENERATOR
    loom::py::loom::gen::x86_low_descriptor_shard
  GENERATED_HDR_FLAGS
    "--view-header=scalar"
    "--view-header=simd128"
    "--view-header=avx2"
    "--view-header=avx512"
    "--view-header=packed_dot"
    "--view-header=avx512_vnni"
    "--view-header=avx512_bf16"
    "--view-header=avx_vnni"
    "--view-header=avx_vnni_int8"
    "--view-header=avx_vnni_int16"
    "--view-header=avx10_2"
  GENERATED_HDRS
    "scalar_descriptors.h"
    "simd128_descriptors.h"
    "avx2_descriptors.h"
    "avx512_descriptors.h"
    "packed_dot_descriptors.h"
    "avx512_vnni_descriptors.h"
    "avx512_bf16_descriptors.h"
    "avx_vnni_descriptors.h"
    "avx_vnni_int8_descriptors.h"
    "avx_vnni_int16_descriptors.h"
    "avx10_2_descriptors.h"
  ARGS
    "--target=avx512_packed_dot"
  DEPS
    loom::codegen::low::descriptors
)
endif()

    loom::py::loom::gen::x86_packed_dot_contract
  SOURCE

  SRCS

  DEPS

    iree::base
)

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_X86)
loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    packed_dot_contract_test
  SRCS
    "packed_dot_contract_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::packed_dot_contract
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
  LABELS
    "iree-build-requirement=loom.target.arch.x86"
)
endif()

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_X86)
loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    packed_dot_contract_projection_test
  SRCS
    "packed_dot_contract_projection_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::packed_dot_contract
    ::packed_dot_contract_projection
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
    loom::analysis::contract_storage
  LABELS
    "iree-build-requirement=loom.target.arch.x86"
)
endif()

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###
